<!-- Design language DL-06 LEX token block -->

## Design language: LEX (DL-06)

**Everything must be traceable.** Ancient Rome: Law and accountability.

Status: adopted. Occasions: claims, mediation, arbitration decks, contractual correspondence.

### Design laws

- Every statement is referenced
- Chronology matters
- Evidence before opinion
- Citations are mandatory
- Ambiguity is minimized

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | evidence-first |
| density | scientific |
| annotation_policy | full |
| legend_policy | direct-labels-only |
| highlight_policy | none |
| decision_style | evidence-only |
| reading_time | session |
| charts_per_page | 2 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| ink | `#1A1A1A` |
| body | `#333333` |
| hairline | `#B9B9B9` |
| gridline | `#CCCCCC` |
| primary | `#7A1F1F` |
| muted | `#B9B9B9` |
| positive | `#333333` |
| negative | `#7A1F1F` |

### Fonts

- display: Georgia,serif, weight 700
- body: Georgia,serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
